servers.page.title: Servers
servers.create.title: Create server
servers.create.description: Set up a new Minecraft server profile
servers.overview.title: Server overview
servers.overview.description: Local profiles managed by this desktop runtime
servers.empty.title: No servers yet
servers.empty.description: Create a new Minecraft server or import an existing folder.
servers.table.name: Name
danger.server.stop.title: Stop server?
danger.server.stop.description: This will stop {server}. Connected players will be disconnected.
danger.server.restart.title: Restart server?
danger.server.restart.description: This will restart {server}. Connected players will be disconnected while it restarts.
servers.startHelp.missingJar.title: Install a server jar before starting
servers.startHelp.missingJar.description: Open Settings, then Server updates. Download the server jar from a trusted source yourself, choose that file here, and install it as server.jar.
servers.startHelp.java.title: Check Java before starting
servers.startHelp.java.description: Open the Java Runtimes page, install the required Java version if needed, then scan again.
servers.startHelp.eula.title: Accept the Minecraft EULA before starting
servers.startHelp.eula.description: Open the server files, review eula.txt, and set eula=true only after you accept Mojang's EULA.
danger.profile.delete.title: Delete server profile?
danger.profile.delete.description: This will remove {server} from MC Server Manager. Files on disk are not deleted.
danger.backup.delete.title: Delete backup?
danger.backup.delete.description: This will permanently delete the backup for {world}.
danger.backup.restore.title: Restore backup?
danger.backup.restore.description: This will restore {world} into {target}. Existing files in that target may be overwritten.
danger.backupProfile.delete.title: Delete backup profile?
danger.backupProfile.delete.description: This will permanently delete the backup profile {profile}. Existing backup archives are not deleted.
danger.content.disable.title: Disable content?
danger.content.disable.description: This will disable {content} on {server}. The server may need a restart before the change takes effect.
danger.content.uninstall.title: Uninstall content?
danger.tunnel.disable.title: Disable provider?
danger.tunnel.disable.description: This will disable {provider}. Servers using this tunnel provider may become unreachable from outside your network.
danger.tunnel.delete.title: Delete provider?
danger.tunnel.delete.description: This will delete {provider} and remove it from tunnel management.
danger.task.delete.title: Delete scheduled task?
danger.task.delete.description: This will permanently delete the scheduled task {task}.
danger.playerList.save.title: Save player list?
danger.playerList.save.description: This will overwrite {list} for {server}. Removed players lose the permissions or access from that list.
danger.update.install.title: Install app update?
danger.update.install.description: This will install the MC Server Manager update. The app may restart or close during installation.
danger.batch.stopAll.title: Stop all running servers?
danger.batch.stopAll.description: This will stop {count} running server(s). Connected players will be disconnected.
danger.logger.clear.title: Clear logs?
danger.logger.clear.description: This will permanently clear the local application log file. Export diagnostics first if you need these entries for support.
danger.createServer.discard.title: Discard server creation?
danger.createServer.discard.description: The server has not started installing. Leaving now will discard this creation draft.
server.setupGuide.title: Setup guide
server.setupGuide.description: These are the required steps to make this profile start. The app guides you, but you choose downloads and agreements yourself.
server.setupGuide.java.title: Install Java first
server.setupGuide.java.body: Use Java Runtimes to scan your computer. Install the Java version required by this Minecraft version if none is detected.
server.setupGuide.jar.title: Put a server.jar in the server folder
server.setupGuide.jar.body: Download the correct server jar from Mojang, Paper, Fabric, Forge, NeoForge, or another trusted loader source, then install it from Server updates.
server.setupGuide.eula.title: Accept the Minecraft EULA
server.setupGuide.eula.body: After you read and accept Mojang's EULA, edit eula.txt in the server folder and set eula=true.
server.setupGuide.start.title: Start the server
server.setupGuide.start.body: Use Start after Java, server.jar, and EULA are ready. If startup fails, read the console error and follow the shown next step.
server.setupGuide.backup.title: Back up before changes
server.setupGuide.backup.body: Create a backup before changing jars, mods, configs, or worlds so you can recover the server state.
server.setupChecklist.title: Setup checklist
server.setupChecklist.description: Current readiness checks for this server. The app explains what is missing; you still choose downloads and agreements yourself.
server.setupChecklist.message.java.ready: A compatible Java runtime is configured for this Minecraft version.
server.setupChecklist.message.java.actio: Install or select a compatible Java runtime before starting this server.
server.setupChecklist.message.java.warni: Review the selected Java runtime before starting this server.
server.setupChecklist.message.serverRunt: The validated server runtime is ready.
Install or repair the validated server runtime before starting.
Review the server runtime before starting.
provisioning.progress.title: Installing server
provisioning.recovery.title: An unfinished server installation needs attention
provisioning.recovery.description: Resume or clean up the persisted installation for {target}.
provisioning.recovery.cleanupCommitted: Files were already committed; resume the final startup step instead.
provisioning.recovery.loadError: Could not inspect unfinished server installations.
provisioning.wizard.drop: Drop one server pack here, or click to select it
provisioning.wizard.dropSingle: Drop one server pack at a time.
provisioning.wizard.noWarnings: No server compatibility warnings were found.
provisioning.wizard.runtimeMetadataRequi: The pack does not contain enough trusted server metadata. Choose the Minecraft and loader versions to prepare a compatible server runtime.
provisioning.wizard.javaDownload: No compatible Java runtime is installed. The app can install a managed Eclipse Temurin runtime without changing the system PATH.
provisioning.wizard.javaConsent: Allow the app to download and install this Java runtime
server.jar is installed in the server folder.
Install a trusted server jar as server.jar from Server updates.
Review server.jar before starting this server.
server.setupChecklist.message.eula.actio: Read the Minecraft EULA, then set eula=true yourself if you accept it.
server.setupChecklist.message.eula.warni: Review the Minecraft EULA state before starting this server.
server.setupChecklist.message.backup.rea: At least one backup exists for this server.
server.setupChecklist.message.backup.act: Create a backup before making risky changes.
server.setupChecklist.message.backup.war: Create a backup before changing jars, mods, configs, or worlds.
